'''Shela Jalahafi''' was a dark-haired [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and a [[Dark side adept/Legends|Dark Side Adept]] who was part of a team entrusted by [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to infiltrate spies and agents into the ranks of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Her brother, [[Teles Jalahafi|Teles]], always lacked her strength, but still felt that he was more powerful then her. They subverted the Rebel underground which rose up on [[Edan II/Legends|Edan II]] until the Imperials attacked them and the Rebels.
